author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: Build 5 end-to-end training experiments as integration tests. Each one does forward+backward+optimizer step on both CPU and GPU (when available), verifying loss decreases over 10 iterations. Tests: (1) MLP/MNIST, (2) Small Transformer, (3) CNN/CIFAR, (4) LSTM LM, (5) VAE with distributions.
